name: placard
why: Render a project.json into a beautiful, embeddable project-overview card for any GitHub README — the "much larger" sibling of a status badge. One image shows what a project is and why, plus live repo stats, products, shipped work, and a roadmap board.

products.name: /api/card
products.desc: Serverless endpoint — project.json to PNG/SVG card

products.name: Playground
products.desc: Edit config live, copy a self-contained embed

products.name: project.json schema
products.desc: JSON Schema for the card config

products.name: render-local
products.desc: CLI to preview cards without deploying

features.label: satori-rendered PNG
features.note: real font metrics, no text overflow

features.label: Graceful error cards (served 200 so they render)

planned.label: GitHub Action to regenerate on push

deferred.label: True dependency-graph viz
deferred.note: chips are more scannable at README scale
